---
title: "Projects"
listing:
  id: projects-list
  contents: data/projects.yml
  type: default
  fields: [image, title, description, categories, date]
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  categories: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

Personal projects and experiments. Each links out to its repo or write-up.

::: {.elsewhere}
[![](logos/github.svg){.elsewhere-logo .elsewhere-logo-github} Open-source pull requests](https://github.com/search?q=is%3Apr+author%3Aleonnoirclerc+-user%3Aleonnoirclerc+is%3Apublic&type=pullrequests){.elsewhere-link}
&nbsp;&nbsp;
[![](logos/huggingface.svg){.elsewhere-logo} Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/leonnoirclerc/activity/all){.elsewhere-link}
:::

::: {#projects-list}
:::
